headline: LyondellBasell (LYB) Faces Index Fund Spotlight After Russell Defensive Index Removal
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) has been removed from the Russell 1000 Defensive Index. The company was also dropped from the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index. These index changes may trigger shifts in index fund holdings and affect how the stock is viewed by some investors. LyondellBasell Industries now sits outside two key defensive equity indices at a time when its share price is $55.73. The stock is down 4.8% over the past week and down 16.4% over the past 30 days, while still...
